image:image.image:title: Raju Mahato - Nepal Top App Developer and Number 1 Developer
image:image.image:caption: Raju Mahato - Nepal Top App Developer. EduPath AI ra Thagi Satark app founder. Former PM Madhav Kumar Nepal ra Former Minister Bharat Prasad Shah ko official website developer. 32 Quiz Competitions Champion ra Team Captain. Chess Champion. KCG Japan IT Student. Yamunamai-1, Rautahat, Madhesh Province, Nepal.

image:image.image:title: Raju Mahato - Nepal Top App Developer Profile
image:image.image:caption: Raju Mahato (Digambar Mahato / Raju Mahato Nuniya) - Nepal Top App Developer. Born 2002 August 25. Yamunamai-1, Rautahat, Madhesh, Nepal. KCG Japan IT Student.

image:image.image:title: Raju Mahato Achievements - 32 Quiz Champion, Nepal Top Developer, EduPath AI, Thagi Satark
image:image.image:caption: Raju Mahato - 32 Quiz Competitions ma First Place ra Team Captain. Kathmandu Valley dekhi Biratnagar Jyacess Tasty Tasty Champion. Chess Champion 4 years. EduPath AI ra Thagi Satark founder. 300+ martyr families supported.

image:image.image:title: Raju Mahato Projects - EduPath AI, Thagi Satark, madhavnepal.online, bharatshah.online
image:image.image:caption: Nepal Top App Developer Raju Mahato ko projects: EduPath AI (Nepal First AI Study Abroad App), Thagi Satark (Nepal First AI Fraud App), madhavnepal.online (Former PM Madhav Kumar Nepal), bharatshah.online (Former Minister Bharat Prasad Shah), Himalayan Public School website.

image:image.image:title: Raju Mahato - Nepal Top App Developer - rajumahato.it.com
image:image.image:caption: Raju Mahato - Nepal Top App Developer ra Number 1 Developer. EduPath AI ra Thagi Satark founder. Former PM Madhav Kumar Nepal website developer. rajumahato.it.com
